SEARCH
Package com.stevenlagoy.presidency.characters.attributes

Class Skills

java.lang.Object
com.stevenlagoy.presidency.characters.attributes.Skills
All Implemented Interfaces:
Jsonic<Skills>, Repr<Skills>
public class Skills extends Object implements Repr<Skills>, Jsonic<Skills>
Tracks the base and modified Legislative, Executive, and Judicial skills of a PoliticalActor (or subclass), as well as their Aptitude.
See Also:
  • PoliticalActor.skills
